prompt: High-fidelity portrait mobile app UI mockup for WakeSaga onboarding setup. Direction: BFF Quiz Cards. A viral Gen Z onboarding quiz screen with bold stacked cards and expressive original anime sticker energy. The screen asks: "Be honest. After your alarm, you usually..." Show 4 oversized answer cards with short casual labels, each with tiny manga reaction stickers and color tabs. Include a playful progress strip, "WakeSaga" at top, a small "training arc setup" chip, and a bottom "Next" CTA. The design should feel social, shareable, and friendly, but still clearly about building a morning anime arc rather than planning a trip. Characters must be totally original: modern hoodies, tees, sleepy hair, headphones, school-bag energy; no ninja headbands, no orange jumpsuits, no direct resemblance to famous anime characters.
style: polished social quiz UI, bold card hierarchy, Gen Z stickerbook aesthetic, original anime/manga identity
composition: single iPhone-sized portrait screen, no device frame, large center question, stacked asymmetrical answer cards, sticky bottom CTA, all text readable
lighting: clean bright daylight with soft UI depth
palette: butter yellow, hot coral, mint, periwinkle, off-white, black ink
text: WakeSaga / training arc setup / Be honest. After your alarm, you usually... / snooze / scroll / rush / lock in / Next
constraints: Keep the app identity anime-motivational, not travel or friendship planning. Use original character/sticker accents only. Text must be minimal and legible. Make all characters original contemporary teens/young adults, not recognizable anime IP.
negative: no Naruto-like character, no ninja headband, no orange jumpsuit, no copyrighted anime IP, no Trip BFF logo or copied layouts, no dark fantasy panels, no cluttered HUD, no fake Japanese text, no long body copy, no low-contrast text, no device frame, no watermark

prompt: High-fidelity portrait mobile app UI mockup for WakeSaga onboarding setup. Direction: Wake Receipt Setup. A Gen Z shareable setup screen that previews the user's future "Wake Receipt" as they answer onboarding questions. Header says "Tomorrow needs an opening scene". Show a central receipt/story card with bold fields: "wake time", "first enemy", "first win", "arc mood". Around it, use anime sunrise stickers, reaction stamps, colored tape, and handwritten annotation energy. Include setup controls under the receipt and a bottom CTA "Set the scene". It should feel like something users would screenshot or share, while still being an alarm onboarding flow.
style: shareable social card UI, Gen Z receipt aesthetic, polished anime morning arc branding
composition: single iPhone-sized portrait screen, no device frame, central receipt card, light setup controls underneath, bottom CTA, large legible text
lighting: bright optimistic morning, soft paper texture without clutter
palette: warm white paper, bubblegum pink, cobalt blue, lime green, golden sunrise, black ink
text: WakeSaga / Tomorrow needs an opening scene / Wake Receipt / wake time / first enemy / first win / arc mood / Set the scene
constraints: Create an original WakeSaga design language. The share card should be legible and app-like, not a poster. Keep copy short. Do not include fake metrics, fake counts, ratings, likes, views, or arbitrary numbers beyond a wake time.
negative: no fake 9.2K, no fake social proof metrics, no random stats, no travel app look, no dark RPG HUD, no terminal/dashboard UI, no fake Japanese text, no copyrighted anime IP, no tiny paragraphs, no device frame, no watermark
